name: Research Desk handles empty query gracefully without crash
description: A logged-in user opens the Research Desk and clicks the search/submit button without entering any query text. The app should show a validation message or keep the UI in its ready state — never crash, never show a blank page, and never make a server call that returns an error the user can see.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the Research Desk page renders — a search/query input is visible
Click the search or submit button without typing anything in the query field
Verify no crash occurs — the page stays intact with either a validation message or the input in its ready state. No error toast reading 'something went wrong' and no blank screen.
